title: Write a cloud-init Config
description:
## Bootstrap a New VM

**cloud-init** configures cloud VMs on first boot from a YAML `#cloud-config` document.

**Your task:** write a file at **`/root/cloud-config.yml`** that:
1. begins with the **`#cloud-config`** header line
2. is valid YAML
3. has a **`packages`** list that includes **`nginx`**

> 💡 The `#cloud-config` first line is a required marker (it is a YAML comment, so it doesn't affect parsing).

hints.title: cloud-config skeleton
hints.body: Start with the header comment, then a packages list of things to install on boot.

validation.description: Checks the #cloud-config header and a packages list containing nginx.

commands.description: Valid YAML with nginx in the packages list
commands.command: python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('/root/cloud-config.yml')); print('ok' if isinstance(d,dict) and 'nginx' in (d.get('packages') or []) else 'no')"
